description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named win7 that builds a project on Windows 2019 with Qt 5.15.2. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on win64 with Qt5. It checks out the repository, caches Qt, installs Qt, creates a build directory, builds the project with qmake, cmake, and make, and then packages the build artifacts. Finally, it archives the artifacts and uploads them as a release.
